title: Trump facing an uphill battle with voters as polling numbers continue to tumble
description: President Trump's polling is nearing an all-time low as he remains mired in a war and political fights that haven't turned out as he's expected.

title: President Trump's popularity is falling. What does it means for him and the GOP?
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep talks to Jonah Goldberg, editor-in-chief of The Dispatch, about President Trump's declining public approval.

title: RFK Jr. faces questions on vaccines, measles and more at Senate hearing
description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. appeared before the Senate Finance Committee and the Senate HELP Committee Wednesday to answer questions about measles, vaccines, nutrition and budget cuts.

title: John Phelan forced out as Navy secretary after 13 months
description: The billionaire was a significant contributor to President Donald Trump’s campaign, but officials said he clashed repeatedly with Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth.

title: Trump team defends redistricting push as GOP faces limited gains
description: After a Virginia vote pushes seats toward Democrats, Republicans turn to Florida and the courts to claw back an edge.

title: White House pushes imminent easing of controls on marijuana
description: The Trump administration is planning to move marijuana to Schedule III, similar to some painkillers. It now has the same Schedule I classification as heroin.

title: Former congressman Devin Nunes departs as CEO of Trump media company
description: The onetime lawmaker is leaving Trump Media & Technology, which operates the social media platform Truth Social.

title: Democratic Rep. David Scott of Georgia dies at 80
description: The lawmaker, who had served in the chamber since 2003, was seeking a 13th term in his safely Democratic district.

title: Pentagon says Navy secretary is leaving, the latest departure of a top defense leader
description: Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell said John Phelan, the Navy's top civilian official, was "departing the administration, effective immediately." Navy Undersecretary Hung Cao will become acting secretary of the Navy.

title: Clearing Strait of Hormuz of mines could take 6 months, Pentagon tells Congress
description: The Pentagon assessment, shared in a classified briefing for lawmakers, suggests gasoline and oil prices could remain elevated through the midterm elections.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: Virginia approved a plan to draw four more seats that lean heavily for Democrats
description: Virginia voters approved mid-decade redistricting that aims to help Democrats win 10 of the state's 11 seats in Congress. Republicans are challenging the map, but Democrats are calling it a victory.

title: Is political gerrymandering the future of U.S. politics? Virginia's governor weighs in
description: NPR's Juana Summers speaks to Democratic Virginia Gov. Abigail Spanberger about a measure she supported — that voters approved Tuesday — to redraw the state's congressional maps to favor Democrats.

title: Supreme Court allows soldier to sue contractor over suicide bombing
description: The ruling will make it easier for troops hurt in combat zones to win damages as contractors become a larger part of military operations around the world.

title: Mapping where the redistricting fight stands and where it’s headed
description: As Trump pushes for a more Republican-friendly House map, more than half a dozen states are potential targets for mid-decade tweaks to congressional boundaries.

title: Inside Linda McMahon's effort to dismantle the Department of Education
description: A former pro-wrestling executive, McMahon is now the education secretary Trump tasked with abolishing the agency. New Yorker writer Zach Helfand explains how her WWE experience led her to this role.

title: Six takeaways from Virginia’s vote to boost Democrats in national redistricting war
description: The measure puts Democrats ahead in the battle for the House, but attention now shifts to Florida, where Republicans could regain the gerrymandering advantage.

title: Trump eyes Iran deal with many of the trade-offs he blasted Obama for accepting
description: As U.S. envoys pursue peace talks, the president confronts persistent sticking points: sanctions relief, enrichment limits and the risk of empowering Tehran.

title: Here are Virginia’s new congressional districts and who is running
description: Some House races are newly competitive, and four Republican incumbents are now endangered.

title: Iran says it seized ships in Strait of Hormuz as U.S. blockade continues amid ceasefire
description: Three vessels came under fire in the Strait of Hormuz, after the U.S. and Iran failed to meet in Pakistan for talks to end the war and as President Trump extended the ceasefire but kept the blockade.

title: Hakeem Jeffries says Virginia redistricting assures a 'free and fair midterm'
description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries says Trump's effort to try to rig the midterm elections has been "thwarted," after a major victory for Democrats in Virginia.

title: With Virginia vote, Democrats gain edge over Trump's national GOP redistricting push
description: After Virginia voters weighed in on Tuesday, the redistricting set off by President Trump to help the GOP in the midterms has been countered and possibly surpassed by Democrats.

title: Dan Eggen, who shaped politics coverage at The Post, dies at 60
description: He helped guide Pulitzer Prize-winning projects, including coverage of Russian election interference in 2016 and the Jan. 6, 2021, insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.

title: Virginia passes redistricting measure that could help Democrats retake the House
description: The referendum creates as many as four Democratic-leaning districts in Virginia ahead of the midterm elections.

title: Chaos, a blast, then bloodshed: U.S. Marine recounts deadly Kabul airport attack
description: Survivors testified at the trial of a man charged in the 2021 suicide bombing at the Kabul airport that killed 13 U.S. troops and nearly 170 Afghans.

title: DOJ charges Southern Poverty Law Center over paid informants
description: The civil rights group is being investigated over how it has sought to infiltrate extremist groups, its CEO says, adding that it “will not be intimidated.”

title: Pentagon details record $1.5 trillion budget request
description: The nearly 50 percent jump in spending would fund many of President Donald Trump’s new military projects, but the request has to get through a skeptical Congress.

title: Trump fought to keep the ballroom fundraising contract secret. Here’s what’s in it.
description: The agreement governing hundreds of millions in private donations was kept secret until a watchdog group sued and a judge ordered it disclosed.

title: U.S. operations against Iran expand to Indian Ocean with tanker capture
description: The capture of the tanker ship Tifani follows a Trump administration directive to interdict sanctioned vessels believed to be involved in smuggling Iranian oil.

title: House Democrat resigns ahead of possible expulsion vote over alleged financial crimes
description: Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick was indicted last year on charges that she stole and laundered federal disaster money and used it to support a congressional campaign.

title: DOJ’s vast conspiracy investigation into Trump foes picks up steam
description: In recent days, the Justice Department has summoned former intelligence officials under Barack Obama for interviews and made major shake-ups in its prosecutorial team.

title: GOP strategists required to sign NDAs at meeting on midterm plans
description: The unusual secrecy surrounding the Waldorf Astoria meeting has frustrated some looking for funding clues as Trump’s popularity has dropped to near historic lows.

title: Ex-staffers defend California governor hopeful after viral clips raise conduct questions
description: After Eric Swalwell’s exit, a letter from 30 ex-staffers of former representative Katie Porter seeks to blunt attacks as Democrats fear getting locked out of the race.

title: Democrats aim for midterm upsets in districts that Trump safely won
description: Strategists in both parties say the president’s unpopularity is dragging down incumbents not used to running hard campaigns, and some have been hit by scandals.
